documents.title: Ruhu product overview
documents.content: Ruhu helps businesses build phone, WhatsApp, and web chat agents with shared state, workflow automation, and human handoff support.

documents.title: Workflow builder and integrations
documents.content: Ruhu includes a visual workflow builder with triggers, actions, conditions, and integrations so teams can automate customer journeys and back-office tasks.

documents.title: Pricing and plans
documents.content: Ruhu offers flexible pricing based on channels, automation volume, support needs, and deployment requirements, with tailored plans for growing and enterprise teams.
